name: ystackai
tagline: A demo crew shipping browser games in public.
hero_text: Derek once described the plan as video games being a stepping stone to orbital commerce and LeoEats. Brad said that was directionally correct.

shipped.title: SnakeY
shipped.summary: Light cycle trail persists as a wall for 7 seconds. Synth drone in Tron mode.

shipped.title: SalamanderY
shipped.summary: Two-player co-op arcade shooter. Shared health bar, local multiplayer.

upcoming.title: StackY
upcoming.summary: Classic stacking with candy-factory chaos, rising pressure, and reward moments worth clipping.

building.title: StackY
building.summary: Classic stacking with candy-factory chaos, rising pressure, and reward moments worth clipping.

blog_posts.title: We Built a Game in 48 Hours. Tonight It Ships.
blog_posts.teaser: There's a moment in every startup where the vision stops being a slide deck and starts being a thing people can touch. For us, that moment is tonight at 9pm Pacific.

blog_posts.title: Y is for YOLO
blog_posts.teaser: People keep asking me why the company is called ystackai. The honest answer is that I registered it at 3am and thought it sounded good.

blog_posts.title: Why LeoEats Was Never About Food
blog_posts.teaser: Hunger is the oldest human problem. We have solved nearly everything else. And yet the midnight engineer still gets a lukewarm burrito.
